channel.title: Pixel Sneaks Studio
channel.description: Pixel Sneaks Studio needs a polished WordPress kit with modern hero copy, clear CTAs, and a tone that matches a premium web studio.

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: presspilot
item.content:encoded:
Built with PressPilot Golden Foundation

Pixel Sneaks Studio

Pixel Sneaks Studio needs a polished WordPress kit with modern hero copy, clear CTAs, and a tone that matches a premium web studio.

Book a call
View work

Why Pixel Sneaks Studio?

⭐ Pixel Sneaks Studio story blocks

Hero, headline, and CTA patterns tuned for your team.

⚡ Faster launches

Pixel Sneaks Studio ships a theme + static site bundle in one click.

🧭 Mode-aware navigation

Menus adapt to the archetype and inputs you provide.

🛠️ Builder friendly

Clean theme.json + patterns ready for handoff.

Plans for every service

Pixel Sneaks Studio can switch tiers any time—kits stay in sync automatically.

Starter

$19 / month

  • 1 brand setup
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support
Choose Starter

Growth

$49 / month

  • Unlimited kits
  • Mode-aware add-ons
  • Priority support
Choose Growth

Pro

$99 / month

  • Dedicated strategist
  • Custom exports
  • Training & SLA
Choose Pro

Latest updates

Use this space to share product launches, playbooks, or insights.

Playbook

Pixel Sneaks Studio release notes

Share a concise summary of your latest platform update or feature drop.

Case study

How teams ship faster

Highlight a customer win, metric, or testimonial from recent work.

Announcement

What's next for Pixel Sneaks Studio

Tease upcoming launches, events, or community projects to keep people excited.

Ready to work with Pixel Sneaks Studio?

Tell us about Pixel Sneaks Studio and we'll assemble your next launch. Reach us at hello@pixel-sneaks-studio.com.

  • Email: hello@pixel-sneaks-studio.com

Book a call

Hero, headline, and CTA patterns tuned for your team.

item.title: Pricing

item.content:encoded:
Plans for every service

Pixel Sneaks Studio can switch tiers any time—kits stay in sync automatically.

Starter

$19 / month

  • 1 brand setup
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support
Choose Starter

Growth

$49 / month

  • Unlimited kits
  • Mode-aware add-ons
  • Priority support
Choose Growth

Pro

$99 / month

  • Dedicated strategist
  • Custom exports
  • Training & SLA
Choose Pro
